artifact: Alipay-PIBench paper and timing-aware official release acquisition

paper.title: Alipay-PIBench: A Realistic Payment Integration Benchmark for Coding Agents
paper.extraction_method: pdftotext -layout; UTF-8 text with page breaks preserved

release.commit_delta_verification: Archive path/CRC comparison found no added or removed files and exactly two changed files: README.md and README.zh-CN.md. GitHub commit metadata reports four additions and four deletions, all replacing paper placeholders with arXiv links. The init commit is therefore the timing-appropriate implementation snapshot; the next commit is documentation-only.
acquisition_observations: The init archive is readable and contains 9,054 files across 11,844 ZIP members; the extracted tree is preserved locally.
The released benchmark_suite/task_instances tree has exactly 18 task directories: one Basic and one Advanced instance for each of nine named product/project pairs.

All 18 task directories contain rubrics.json, static.py, integration.py, e2e.py, and a local alipay-payment-integration/SKILL.md; no deterministic unit.py file was found by path inventory, despite the paper's general static/unit/integration/end-to-end description.
Six of 18 task directories contain llm_assisted/review_prompt.md. Acquisition did not determine whether the remaining rubrics omit semantic checks or implement them elsewhere.

No paper-run trajectory or aggregate raw-result release was identified by a conservative filename inventory. Assets include plotted main results; this observation requires confirmation during deep review and is not a reproducibility conclusion.
release.timing_boundary: arXiv v1 was published at 2026-07-16T05:08:20Z. The repository init commit followed at 2026-07-16T10:30:06Z; the docs-only arXiv-link commit followed at 2026-07-17T03:13:18Z. Both postdate v1 publication. Their proximity and the paper link support official-release relevance but do not prove byte identity with the implementation used to produce paper results.

text_spot_checks: title, authors, abstract, immutable arXiv v1 marker, and official repository URL
Product-Grounded Task Construction, Basic/Advanced decomposition, rubric-derived evaluation, and paired Skill protocol
method-level diagnostics, conclusion, references, and final manuscript page
verification.source_archive_test: tarfile parse succeeded; 13 members and 11 regular files including main.tex, references.bib, class/style assets, and paper figures
verification.release_archive_tests: Zip CRC tests succeeded for both 11,844-member archives

acquisition_scope: Created verifiable local full-paper, immutable source, and timing-aware pinned-release evidence for the queued review. This is source acquisition and extraction verification, not a deep paper/repository audit, benchmark replay, score reproduction, Skill-effect estimate, payment correctness claim, safety claim, professional-validity claim, production-fitness claim, or readiness claim.
